title: lithocarpus cyclophorus
intro: Lithocarpus cyclophorus, also known as the Burmese tanak or tanak, is a plant species in the beech family, Fagaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Traditionally, Lithocarpus cyclophorus is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
